commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of an auth-provider endpoint contract and optional full-login proof, not an automated repair.; Cleared: The diff changes MiniMax OAuth endpoint constants and regression tests only; I found no new dependency, CI, script, permission, secret-handling, or broader supply-chain concern. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates MiniMax OAuth device-code and token requests to use `account.minimax.io` / `account.minimaxi.com` `/oauth2/*` endpoints while preserving API base URLs for resource access, and adds global/CN regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +61. Total +63 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and live-provider evidence: current main posts MiniMax OAuth forms to API hosts, guarded fetch strips POST bodies on cross-origin redirects, and maintainer probes confirmed those API OAuth URLs now redirect to account `/oauth2/*` endpoints. I did not personally complete the failing login end-to-end, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of an auth-provider endpoint contract and optional full-login proof, not an automated repair.
